user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new department, so that the organization structure reflects new business units
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Department screen; When I click "Add new department" and enter Name, Parent department, Department acronym and Description; Then the department is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view departments in a list with their key attributes, so that I can review the org structure at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Department screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Name, Parent department, Department acronym, Description and Department ID

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing department, so that I can keep department details accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a department is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated values are saved and shown in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set a parent department for a department, so that hierarchical reporting structures are captured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a department; When I select a parent department; Then the child-parent relationship is stored and displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the department list, so that I can browse all 52 departments and see current data
acceptance_criteria: Given the department list spans multiple pages; When I use the pagination controls or click Refresh; Then the corresponding departments are displayed with updated data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the setup workflow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have reviewed the Department screen; When I click Next; Then I am advanced to the next configuration step
